ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the client joined the system */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Unique tax identifier for the client */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the client */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Client's occupation */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Estimated net worth of the client */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Client's risk tolerance profile */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Client's investment objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., Brokerage, Retirement) */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Unique account number for external reference */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Investment objective for the account */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the account */,
  "minimum_balance" REAL /* Minimum balance required to maintain the account */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of the investment (e.g., Stock, Bond, Cash) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or code of the investment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was added to the system */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer of the investment */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate for bonds */,
  "yield" REAL /* Current yield of the investment */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the investment */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account holding the investment */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment being held */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the investment held */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the investment was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the investment was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current market price of the investment */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the holding */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Total cost basis of the holding */,
  "unrealized_gain_loss" REAL /* Unrealized gain or loss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account where the transaction occurred */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal, Purchase, Sale) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the transaction */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction will be settled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account being tracked */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "end_market_value" REAL /* End market value of the investment */,
  "starting_balance" REAL /* Starting balance of the investment */,
  "additions" REAL /* Additions to the investment */,
  "withdrawals" REAL /* Withdrawals from the investment */,
  "change_in_investment_value" REAL /* Change in investment value */,
  "ending_balance" REAL /* Ending balance of the investment */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Value of the benchmark index for comparison */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value indicating performance relative to the benchmark */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating volatility relative to the benchmark */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio for risk-adjusted returns */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio for downside risk-adjusted returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_performance" (
  "account_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account performance record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "total_end_market_value" REAL /* Total end market value of all investments in the account */,
  "total_starting_balance" REAL /* Total starting balance of all investments in the account */,
  "total_additions" REAL /* Total additions to all investments in the account */,
  "total_withdrawals" REAL /* Total withdrawals from all investments in the account */,
  "total_change_in_investment_value" REAL /* Total change in investment value for all investments in the account */,
  "total_ending_balance" REAL /* Total ending balance of all investments in the account */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Value of the benchmark index for comparison */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value indicating performance relative to the benchmark */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating volatility relative to the benchmark */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio for risk-adjusted returns */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio for downside risk-adjusted returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_performance_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Client, Advisor, Admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., Read-Only, Full Access) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
